title: Java Developer
responsibilities:
• Design, develop, and maintain Java-based applications and backend services.
• Write clean, efficient, and reusable code following coding standards and best practices.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including designers, testers, and senior developers.
• Assist in developing REST APIs and integrating third-party services.
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues.
• Participate in code reviews, testing, and deployment activities.
• Work with databases to write queries, manage data, and optimize performance.
• Learn and adapt to new tools, frameworks, and technologies in software development.
• Contribute to documentation of technical processes and project workflows.
• Support maintenance and enhancement of existing applications.
